name: Google Workspace
description: Google Workspace via Google MCP — Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Contacts
purpose: Core business productivity integration for Google Workspace tenants

gmail.notes: gmail.send classified as write — requires explicit approval per role

drive.notes: drive.file (create/edit files) classified as write — requires explicit approval per role

calendar.notes: calendar.events write classified as write — requires explicit approval per role

contacts.notes: Contacts read-only; includes PII — flag for data handling review

notes: Requires a Google Cloud project with Workspace APIs enabled and a service account with domain-wide delegation
Domain-wide delegation must be granted in the Google Workspace admin console
Namespace prefix: all tools surfaced as gws.<tool_name>
Google API rate limits vary by API — Gmail: 250 quota units/second/user, Drive: 1,000 requests/100 seconds/user
